center.name: Cape Portland
center.summary: Cape Portland是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括黑噪钟鹊，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Tasmania|journal=Emu|volume=72|pages=167–70|doi=10.1071/MU972167|issue=4 |bibcode=1972EmuAO..72..167M }} The black currawong has expanded into the northeast corner of the island, to Musselroe Bay and Cape Portland. The black currawong is generally found in wetter eucalypt forests, dominated by such species as alpine ash (Eucalyptus delegatensis), messmate (E. obliqua), and mountain gum (E. dalrympleana), sometimes with a beech (Nothofagus) understory
